GG0130C3_TOILTG_HYGN_FLWP_CD GG0130C3 Self Care: Toileting Hygiene Ability at Follow-Up Indicates the patient's ability to perform toileting hygiene tasks at follow-up. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only
